title: Incomplete Endpoint Hardening Baseline
description: Multiple critical servers are missing baseline hardening controls in recent security checks.
reasoning: Repeated deviations from hardening baseline across internet-exposed systems raise exploitability risk.
possibleDamage: Unauthorized access, malware execution, and prolonged system compromise.
mitigationSteps: Enforce CIS hardening profiles through automation
Run weekly compliance scans for exposed assets
Block production promotion for non-compliant builds

title: Recurring Incident Escalation Delays
description: Incident response timelines exceed SLA in repeated severity-2 events.
reasoning: Four incidents in six weeks show delayed escalation, increasing blast radius before containment.
possibleDamage: Longer downtime, customer dissatisfaction, and delayed regulatory notifications.
mitigationSteps: Run monthly response drills with on-call teams

title: Delayed Closure of Compliance Exceptions
description: Open compliance exceptions remain unresolved beyond policy timelines.
reasoning: Exception aging exceeds control thresholds, indicating weak remediation governance.
possibleDamage: Audit observations, enforcement scrutiny, and control effectiveness degradation.
mitigationSteps: Track exception KPIs in governance review

title: Single Supplier Dependency for Core Networking
description: Critical network operations rely on one supplier without tested failover options.
reasoning: Supplier concentration and weak contingency coverage increase continuity risk.
possibleDamage: Network outages, delayed restoration, and customer service disruption.

title: Unverified API Integrations with Elevated Privileges
description: External APIs have broad permissions without periodic access validation.
reasoning: Privilege scope exceeds least-privilege baseline for multiple third-party integrations.
possibleDamage: Token misuse, data leakage, and unauthorized workflow execution.
mitigationSteps: Enable anomaly alerts for integration actions

title: Manual Change Logs Not Updated On Time
description: Critical infrastructure changes are recorded late in manual operational logs.
reasoning: Late documentation reduces traceability and increases recovery complexity during incidents.
possibleDamage: Troubleshooting delays and repeated misconfigurations.
mitigationSteps: Mandate same-day logging for high-impact changes
Migrate manual logs to centralized change tracker

title: Dormant Administrative Accounts Detected
description: Inactive privileged accounts remain enabled beyond acceptable inactivity periods.
reasoning: Dormant admin accounts are common entry points for unauthorized access.
possibleDamage: Privilege abuse, unauthorized system changes, and delayed detection.
mitigationSteps: Auto-disable admin accounts after inactivity threshold

title: Repeated Backup Job Failures
description: Scheduled backups for critical datasets have failed across consecutive runs.
reasoning: Consecutive failures reduce recovery confidence and increase disaster impact.
possibleDamage: Data loss, extended recovery times, and service interruption.
mitigationSteps: Implement backup success alerting at source level

title: Control Ownership Ambiguity in Key Domains
description: Multiple compliance controls lack clear accountable owners in governance records.
reasoning: Undefined ownership slows remediation and weakens control accountability.
possibleDamage: Missed remediation deadlines and recurring audit comments.
mitigationSteps: Assign named owners for each control statement

title: Vendor Security Questionnaire Staleness
description: Security assessments for high-risk vendors are outdated beyond review frequency.
reasoning: Aging assessments create blind spots for changed threat and control posture.
possibleDamage: Undetected vendor weaknesses affecting confidentiality and continuity.
mitigationSteps: Link questionnaire expiry to procurement workflows

title: Third-Party Script Integrity Drift
description: External script versions loaded in production are not pinned to approved hashes.
reasoning: Unpinned dependencies increase supply-chain compromise exposure on customer-facing channels.
possibleDamage: Client-side compromise, session theft, and reputational harm.
mitigationSteps: Pin all external scripts with integrity hashes
Enforce CSP policies for approved origins

title: Incomplete Incident Postmortem Actions
description: Corrective actions from incident postmortems remain open beyond target closure dates.
reasoning: Delayed corrective actions increase likelihood of repeat incidents.
possibleDamage: Recurring outages and degraded service reliability.
mitigationSteps: Add executive review for overdue action items

title: Weak Segmentation Between Production and Non-Production
description: Network paths allow unnecessary movement between production and lower environments.
reasoning: Insufficient segmentation materially increases lateral movement risk after compromise.
possibleDamage: Privilege escalation, production disruption, and widespread compromise.
mitigationSteps: Validate segmentation controls with red-team tests

title: Service Desk Queue Saturation Risk
description: Critical support tickets are increasing while resolution capacity remains flat.
reasoning: Growing queue age and unresolved high-priority incidents indicate operational bottlenecks.
possibleDamage: SLA breaches, user productivity loss, and backlog expansion.
mitigationSteps: Introduce surge staffing for critical queues
Define escalation thresholds by queue age

title: Policy Acknowledgement Coverage Gap
description: A subset of employees has not acknowledged updated security policies.
reasoning: Incomplete acknowledgements reduce enforceability and awareness of revised obligations.
possibleDamage: Policy non-adherence and weak audit evidence.
mitigationSteps: Block system access after grace period

title: Critical Vendor Financial Distress Signal
description: Financial health indicators for a strategic vendor show increased default probability.
reasoning: Deteriorating financial metrics raise risk of service degradation and contract disruption.
possibleDamage: Service continuity issues and emergency replacement costs.
mitigationSteps: Evaluate alternative providers for critical services

title: Over-Privileged OAuth Application Scopes
description: Connected applications request broad OAuth scopes inconsistent with required functions.
reasoning: Scope sprawl increases token abuse and unauthorized data access impact.
possibleDamage: Unauthorized access to sensitive data and process manipulation.
mitigationSteps: Set expiry and periodic re-consent requirements

title: Untracked Emergency Operational Workarounds
description: Temporary workarounds implemented during outages were not formally retired.
reasoning: Temporary controls persisting in production can bypass standard safeguards.
possibleDamage: Control gaps, instability, and recurring incidents.
mitigationSteps: Define mandatory expiry and owner for each workaround

title: Insufficient MFA Coverage for Legacy Interfaces
description: Legacy admin interfaces still permit single-factor authentication.
reasoning: Absence of MFA on admin surfaces significantly elevates account takeover probability.
possibleDamage: Unauthorized admin access and systemic service compromise.
mitigationSteps: Enforce MFA across all legacy admin paths
Disable direct legacy login where feasible
Monitor for repeated failed authentication attempts

title: High Repeat Rate of Configuration Drift Incidents
description: Frequent configuration drift incidents indicate weak change discipline.
reasoning: Recurring drift patterns show inadequate preventive controls in deployment pipeline.
possibleDamage: Service instability and repeated rollback events.
mitigationSteps: Add drift detection in CI/CD gates

title: Control Testing Evidence Inconsistency
description: Evidence submitted for periodic control tests is incomplete in multiple domains.
reasoning: Inconsistent evidence quality impairs assurance reliability and audit readiness.
possibleDamage: Audit delays, remediation overhead, and governance inefficiency.
mitigationSteps: Train control owners on documentation requirements
Perform pre-audit quality checks each cycle

title: Third-Party Subprocessor Transparency Gap
description: Critical vendors have not provided current subprocessor inventories.
reasoning: Lack of subprocessor transparency increases hidden supply-chain and privacy exposure.
possibleDamage: Undisclosed data transfers and regulatory non-compliance risk.
mitigationSteps: Map subprocessors to data classification levels

title: Event-Driven Privilege Override Without Approval
description: Emergency privilege overrides were activated during events without full approval trails.
reasoning: Unapproved elevated access during events creates insider and misuse risk.
possibleDamage: Unauthorized data access, policy violations, and forensic blind spots.
mitigationSteps: Log all elevated sessions with session recording
